# Let's load the file contents to analyze
path = "/mnt/data/file-VBzmM5uPxn3gmz6WScogfX-text_to_analyse.txt"
try:
    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        text = f.read()
    text_len = len(text)
    text[:1000], text_len

path = "/mnt/data/file-VBzmM5uPxn3gmz6WScogfX-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:1000]

text_lower = text  # No lower-case; we will search exactly as is.
# define candidate MATN strings
candidates = [
    "وَلَوْ كَانَ مِنْ عِندِ غَيْرِ اللَّهِ لَوَجَدُوا فِيهِ اخْتِلَافًا كَثِيرًا",
    "وَنُنَزِّلُ مِنْ الْقُرْآنِ مَا هُوَ شِفَاءٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَلا يَزِيدُ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا خَسَارًا",
    "فَاسْأَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ"
]
for c in candidates:
    print(c in text)
    print("count:", text.count(c))

def all_occurrences(s, sub):
    idxs = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        idx = s.find(sub, start)
        if idx == -1:
            break
        idxs.append(idx)
        start = idx + 1  # allow overlaps? Not overlapping? We can do +1 to avoid missing.
    return idxs

occ1 = all_occurrences(text, candidates[0])
occ2 = all_occurrences(text, candidates[1])
occ3 = all_occurrences(text, candidates[2])
occ1, occ2, occ3

# compute the 6 spans
spans = []
# 1st phrase occurs at 206, 362, 797
indices1 = occ1
for idx in indices1:
    span = text[idx:idx+len(candidates[0])]
    spans.append({"start": idx, "end": idx+len(candidates[0]), "span": span, "type":"Aya"})
# 2nd phrase: 2 occurrences
indices2 = occ2
for idx in indices2:
    span = text[idx:idx+len(candidates[1])]
    spans.append({"start": idx, "end": idx+len(candidates[1]), "span": span, "type":"Aya"})
# 3rd phrase: 1 occurrence
indices3 = occ3
for idx in indices3:
    span = text[idx:idx+len(candidates[2])]
    spans.append({"start": idx, "end": idx+len(candidates[2]), "span": span, "type":"Aya"})
spans

for i, s in enumerate(spans, 1):
    print(i, s["start"], s["end"], repr(s["span"]), s["type"])
